title: keraselma retusum
intro: Keraselma retusum, also known as the Retuse Keraselma or Keraselma, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Keraselma, a group of flowering plants in the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Keraselma retusum include its ability to soothe and calm the body, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
